headline: EQT Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: EQT is set to report Q2 results on July 21, as flat sales volumes may have supported performance, but lower natural gas prices and a negative Earnings ESP cloud the outlook.

raw.headline: EQT Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
raw.summary: EQT is set to report Q2 results on July 21, as flat sales volumes may have supported performance, but lower natural gas prices and a negative Earnings ESP cloud the outlook.

headline: Antero Resources Is in Play: Which Energy Titan Will Acquire It?
summary: Antero Resources has quietly transformed into one of Appalachia's most coveted takeover targets, and a handful of energy titans are circling with very different motivations. The question is not whether a deal happens, but who wins and why.

raw.headline: Antero Resources Is in Play: Which Energy Titan Will Acquire It?
raw.summary: Antero Resources has quietly transformed into one of Appalachia's most coveted takeover targets, and a handful of energy titans are circling with very different motivations. The question is not whether a deal happens, but who wins and why.
